description_long: This humanoid robot features a smooth, egg-shaped body with a seamless, glossy exterior. The front displays a large, oval-shaped black panel that likely serves as a face or interface, contrasting with the otherwise white surface. The body is symmetrical and tapers towards the bottom, giving it a streamlined, modern appearance. There are no visible limbs, joints, or appendages, suggesting a minimalist design focused on simplicity and elegance. The surface appears hard and highly reflective, indicating a shell made from polished plastic or composite material. The overall form is compact and monolithic, with no visible seams or openings except for the front panel.
description: A sleek, egg-shaped humanoid robot with a glossy white body and a large black oval panel on the front. The design is minimalist, with no visible limbs or joints.
description_view_0: Front view showing a prominent black oval panel set into the smooth white body, likely representing the robot's face or interface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curvature of the body and the edge of the black panel, with the rest of the surface remaining glossy white.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous, unbroken white surface with no visible features or panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the curvature and partial edge of the black panel.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral, upright standing pose with no visible limbs or articulated body parts. The body is monolithic and symmetrical.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only a smooth, integrated shell with no decorative elements or coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a large, black oval panel with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose. There are no expressive or display elements apparent.
attribute_limb_articulation: No limbs or articulation points are visible; the body appears rigid and seamless with no joints.
